issues.description: Third effect with trigger 'Trigger' and actions (Rest + KO with maxCost 5) does not match card text. Card text contains only two conditional effects: base effect (cost ≤4) and conditional effect if trash ≥15 (cost ≤6). The third effect appears to be from a different card or misplaced.
Conditional effect should use 'Instead' logic to replace the first effect rather than coexist. DSL structure treats both as independent OnPlay triggers, which may cause ambiguity in resolution order.
